purpose: Top-level shell container that keeps primary topology and cockpit zones consistent.
truth_rules: Frame-level status chips must come from /api/state-derived data.
Missing data renders UNKNOWN, never synthetic green.
accessibility_rules: Shell structure remains readable at 1366x768 without horizontal scroll.
proof_requirements: Screen capture of full shell with top/main/right/footer segmentation.
Mapping proof to index.html layout zones.
change_safety: Frame spacing or borders may change without mutating organ semantics.
